problem id: 67032a5c
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(3)

examples:
  00101011 -> 01011001
  11101001 -> 01001111
  10111110 -> 11110101
  11101011 -> 01011111
  11100011 -> 00011111
  00001000 -> 01000000
  00011001 -> 11001000
  01010110 -> 10110010
  00000011 -> 00011000

query: 10011111
predicted answer: 11111100
